name: Find out how many times the array is rotated
statement: Given an integer array nums of size n, sorted in ascending order with distinct values. The array has been right rotated an unknown number of times, between 0 and n-1 (including). Determine the number of rotations performed on the array.
constraints:
•  n == nums.length
  •  1 <= n <= 104
  •  -104 <= nums[i] <= 104
  •  All the integers of nums are unique.

examples.explanation: The original array should be [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]. So, we can notice that the array has been rotated 4 times.
The original array should be [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. So, we can notice that the array has been rotated 3 times.
